name: sdframe-static-reference
description: SDFrame currently provides a static read API and AI skill package. A live MCP JSON-RPC transport is not operated from this GitHub Pages deployment.

tools.name: list_frameworks
tools.description: Use the static JSON API endpoint /api/frameworks.index.json to list framework summaries.

tools.name: get_framework
tools.description: Use /api/frameworks/{slug}.json to retrieve one framework by slug.
